revision.comment: consistent with the table: nolink=yes for the alternate names, remove bolding
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.text: {| class="wikitable" |+ Font size templates {{view|Template:Font size templates|edit|brackets=y}} |- ! Code for inline content !! Code for block content !! Size !! Result |- | {{tlx|small|text}} || {{tlx|smalldiv|text}} || 85% || {{small|text}} |- | {{tlx|resize|text}} || {{tlx|resizediv|text}} || 90% || {{resize|text}} |- | {{CNone|none}} || {{CNone|none}} || 100% || text |- | {{tlx|large|text}} || {{tlx|largediv|text}} || 120% || {{large|text}} |- | {{tlx|huge|text}} || || 180% || {{huge|text}} |- | {{tlx|resize|<var>x</var>%|text}} || {{tlx|resizediv|<var>x</var>%|text}} || custom || varies |- | {{tlx|font|size{{=}}<var>x</var>%}} || || custom || varies |}<noinclude> [[Category:Resizing templates| ]] </noinclude>

{| class="wikitable" |+ Font size templates {{view|Template:Font size templates|edit|brackets=y}} |- ! Code for inline content !! Code for block content !! Size !! Result |- | {{tlx|small|text}} || {{tlx|smalldiv|text}} || 85% || {{small|text}} |- | {{tlx|resize|text}} || {{tlx|resizediv|text}} || 90% || {{resize|text}} |- | {{CNone|none}} || {{CNone|none}} || 100% || text |- | {{tlx|large|text}} || {{tlx|largediv|text}} || 120% || {{large|text}} |- | {{tlx|huge|text}} || || 180% || {{huge|text}} |- | {{tlx|resize|<var>x</var>%|text}} || {{tlx|resizediv|<var>x</var>%|text}} || custom || varies |- | {{tlx|font|size{{=}}<var>x</var>%}} || || custom || varies |}<noinclude> [[Category:Resizing templates| ]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Font_size_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Font_size_templates for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {| class="wikitable" |+ Font size templates {{view|Template:Font size templates|edit|brackets=y}} |- ! Code for inline content !! Code for block content !! Size !! Result |- | {{tlx|small|text}} || {{tlx|smalldiv|text}} || 85% || {{small|text}} |- | {{tlx|resize|text}} || {{tlx|resizediv|text}} || 90% || {{resize|text}} |- | {{CNone|none}} || {{CNone|none}} || 100% || text |- | {{tlx|large|text}} || {{tlx|largediv|text}} || 120% || {{large|text}} |- | {{tlx|huge|text}} || || 180% || {{huge|text}} |- | {{tlx|resize|<var>x</var>%|text}} || {{tlx|resizediv|<var>x</var>%|text}} || custom || varies |- | {{tlx|font|size{{=}}<var>x</var>%}} || || custom || varies |}<noinclude> [[Category:Resizing templates| ]] </noinclude>
